data.body: Investigation complete. Root cause: per-worktree-review-commit.md and REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md have conflicting CWD assumptions — the prohibition on isolation:worktree was written for shared-directory mode but per-worktree context needs the reviewer to operate in the worktree CWD. Fix: Update per-worktree-review-commit.md to explicitly instruct cd into worktree and pass REPO_ROOT in review dispatch prompt. testing_mode=GREEN.
